front: What are the major classes of peptide-based diseases?
back: 1) Amyloidosis (misfolded peptide aggregation), 2) Peptide deficiency syndromes (hormone insufficiency), 3) Peptide excess disorders (hormone overproduction), 4) Autoimmune peptide diseases (immune response against self-peptides), 5) Infectious peptide diseases (viral/bacterial peptide toxins).
